title: Evil Hunter
description: A new monster has appeared in your world and interrupted the ritual... you need to banish it!
body:
![Evil Hunter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a1ea5b47a2288eb0b3633baa21012450887e965.png)

We've launched a Discord server! Join us! https://discord.gg/NE6fdKPXFG

## Years ago, your son vanished

He was a quiet, curious kid. He was really into occult stuff, old rituals, and symbols he'd copy them into notebooks with a weird exactness. Then he started building all that stuff in Minecraft. One evening, he went to his room to play. By the next morning, he was just gone.

---

Time passed. You moved. You tried to forget.

But then, while unpacking, you found an **old, unmarked hard drive** in a box you didn't even remember sealing. It only had one file on it: a Minecraft world. The last thing you had of him.

So you loaded it.

---

The second you got in, a **book** just showed up in your hands. No title, just some lines written in a handwriting you almost knew. These were strange words, not really like poetry, but more like *instructions*. Something was pulling you forward, deeper, away from where you started.

*You followed it.*

---

The world was empty and silent. Just grass, wind, and a real feeling of nothingness until you finally found it.

A **ritual circle**, made from rough stone blocks. And right in the middle something that definitely didn't fit. A single block that had no name, no texture from any game version you'd ever seen. It pulsed really faintly, like someone holding their breath.

*It called out to you, even without making a sound.*

**You reached out and touched it.**

---

You play as a father searching for his lost son. At the start, you are given a book to activate a ritual, but unfortunately, the process is interrupted. Now, you must find a way to resume it!

The book contains full instructions on how to craft all the necessary ingredients to restore the ritual. However, something will be constantly hindering you and hunting you down while you try to gather the silver

<details>
<summary>Gameplay</summary>

This mod is built in the **vanilla Minecraft style** and is designed to fit seamlessly into any modpack alongside other mods.

**It includes:**
- **13 unique events**
- **New items** and **craftable weapons**
- A **story with ending**
- A **fullboss fight**

It's a small mod, but it's well-designed and made with care. Good luck!

</details>

---

_This mod was commissioned by the YouTuber Vivilly and I recommend subscribing to his channel!_
